name: FHIR R4 Web App
description: Browser UI for the FHIR R4 API. Browse, filter, create, edit, and delete FHIR resources. Requires fhir-api to be running and FHIR_WEB_API_BASE_URL to be set correctly.
notes: Requires fhir-api to be running. In Codespaces, set FHIR_WEB_API_BASE_URL in .env to the forwarded port 3001 URL (e.g. https://your-codespace-3001.preview.app.github.dev).
